markdown:
# Athlete

You gain the following benefits.

## Climb Speed

You gain a [[climb_speed Speed]] equal to your [[speed]].

## Hop Up

When you have the [[prone]] condition, you can right yourself with only 5 feet of movement.

## Jumping

You can make a running [[long_jump]] or [[high_jump Jump]] after moving only 5 feet.
